zero_crossing_protocol.phase_alignment: Cutting audio exactly at the 0V crossing to avoid clicks
zero_crossing_protocol.tail_injection: Adding a 2ms burst of high-freq noise (8kHz+) at the cut point
zero_crossing_protocol.echo_ghosting: Last 50ms of audio sent to a 100% feedback delay at -48dB
zero_crossing_protocol.rule: Every absolute silence must be preceded by a 'Spectral Breath' (Block 26).
